title: Opinion: Opinion | Pak Needs To Understand: Its Indus Treaty 'Threats' To India Are Fooling No One
summary_full: Pakistan's hysterics and fits haven't impressed India, much less make her re-consider her stand on the treaty. If Islamabad is trying to threaten its way to water, it is already failing.
summary_public: Pakistan's hysterics and fits haven't impressed India, much less make her re-consider her stand on the treaty. If Islamabad is trying to threaten its way to water, it is already failing.
